title: Bharat Heavy Electricals is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!
